description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to all branches except staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that builds on multiple OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-16.04) with different configurations, checks out the repository, syncs submodules, prepares the environment, builds in debug and release modes, tests, and packages the build artifacts for upload.
